stories.headline: Google will pay SpaceX $920M per month for compute
stories.blurb: Google signed a deal to pay SpaceX nearly a billion dollars monthly for computing power, citing unexpected demand for its new AI products. The arrangement suggests Google's existing data center capacity can't keep up with how fast people are adopting its AI tools.
stories.why_it_matters: AI demand is now so intense that even Google needs to rent compute from a rocket company.
stories.original_headline: Google will pay SpaceX $920M per month for compute

stories.headline: Cursor SDK now lets you ship agents that review their own code
stories.blurb: Cursor's TypeScript and Python SDKs added auto-review (agents can critique their own output before committing), custom tools, nested subagents, and custom stores for state. You also get run correlation IDs for tracing multi-step workflows and lighter imports that speed up cold starts.
stories.why_it_matters: Auto-review means agents can catch their own mistakes before you do—closer to self-correcting automation.
stories.original_headline: Custom stores, custom tools, and auto-review for the Cursor SDK

stories.headline: Companies are panicking over AI bills they can't predict or control
stories.blurb: After months of 'move fast' AI deployments, enterprises are hitting surprise six-figure token bills with no way to forecast spend. Teams that encouraged experimentation now scramble for usage caps, model downgrades, and kill switches as CFOs demand answers no one has.
stories.why_it_matters: The gold rush phase is over — now comes the part where someone has to explain the bill.
stories.original_headline: The token bill comes due: Inside the industry scramble to manage AI’s runaway costs

stories.headline: OpenAI is about to redesign ChatGPT as a selling tool for premium products
stories.blurb: The company plans its biggest ChatGPT overhaul since 2022, turning the chatbot into a gateway that funnels users toward higher-margin offerings like enterprise tools and API access. The move comes as OpenAI eyes a potential IPO.
stories.why_it_matters: ChatGPT stops being just a product and becomes the storefront for everything else OpenAI sells.
stories.original_headline: OpenAI plots biggest ChatGPT overhaul since launch
